Careers
Make a difference every day.
Looking for a meaningful role in a supportive, people-first workplace?

We care about our staff as much as we care for the seniors we serve. At Parkview, you’ll find a positive work environment rooted in respect, compassion, and excellence.

Why work at Parkview?

Purpose-driven work
Competitive pay and benefits
Wellness programs and employee recognition
Learning and growth opportunities
A warm, inclusive workplace
INFUSING FUN INTO WORK!

Celebrating Mardi Gras with our residents.

Current Opportunities
RPN Casual

Parkview Services for Seniors is an equal opportunity employer.
We welcome applications from all qualified individuals and are committed to a hiring process that is inclusive and accessible. Accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in the selection process.

For more information on career opportunities or to submit your resume, please contact hr@parkviewhome.ca. We appreciate the interest of all applicants, however only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

This is your community.
